description: 30 fact topics (24 third-party, 6 user-self), 90 fact messages + 187 distractors = 277 build-up turns, then 30 recall questions. Facts are placed before a heavy distractor tail so all are evicted from the 4000-token context cap by recall time.

recall_questions.question: Do you remember when my birthday is?
